completed_slice: Define and test the exact Cloudflare GitHub Environment, project, required secret names, least-privilege expectations, acceptance artifacts, and privacy prohibitions.

progress.verification: 4 deterministic tests passed in an isolated Node.js runtime using byte-identical pre-commit files.

blocker: The cloudflare-research GitHub Environment still requires CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID and CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN. No secret value is stored or requested by the committed contract.
next_action: Configure the two named GitHub Environment secrets, dispatch .github/workflows/cloudflare-pages-research.yml, and retain the returned deployment URL plus accepted proof artifacts.
